suspectedFailure: JSearch advances the rotation beyond partitions never attempted after an error.
expected: failed/aborted slices retain the cursor so unattempted partitions remain scheduled
actual: rate-limit abort fixture retains cursor and records partial completeness
rootCause: cursor_next used planned query count rather than completed terminal partitions
proposedFix: advance only when every planned partition reaches a complete terminal state

suspectedFailure: All Workday board failures are reported as legitimate zero results.
expected: failed, partial_failure and no_results are distinct states
actual: all-board failure fixture returns status=failed with board error
rootCause: board exception wrapper returned an empty list without error state
proposedFix: preserve per-board terminal errors and derive aggregate status

suspectedFailure: France Travail pagination can silently complete after repeated pages or a local maximum.
expected: repeated, empty-intermediate, source-total mismatch and local-cap states are non-success
rootCause: loop termination did not carry an explicit completeness state
proposedFix: fail closed with pagination metadata and exact source-total reconciliation

expected: live accessible totals reconcile to exact IDs
actual: local France Travail cap detection is executable; live accessible-total reconciliation requires provider credentials

blocker.dependency: read-only France Travail provider credentials and plan metadata
blocker.unblockProcedure: run the exact-set census with France Travail read-only credentials and archive Content-Range totals

expected: live accessible totals reconcile to exact IDs
actual: local cap detection blocks rather than claiming an inexact split; live accessible-total reconciliation requires provider credentials

blocker.dependency: read-only JSearch/RapidAPI credentials and plan metadata
blocker.unblockProcedure: run capped queries with a read-only key and archive plan-specific totals/cap metadata

suspectedFailure: Direct ATS adapters slice at a local limit without exposing whether more source rows exist.
affectedPath: Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Recruitee, Personio and Teamtailor adapters
expected: limit+1/cursor evidence produces complete or capped terminal status
actual: list-compatible batches carry explicit completeness; limit+1 and SmartRecruiters hard-cap fixtures produce capped_needs_split
rootCause: adapter return type carries rows only and loses truncation state
proposedFix: thread list-compatible batch completeness through source refresh; cap hits are terminal capped errors and never silent success

blocker.dependency: read-only live board inventory with a source-reported total or independently enumerable board
blocker.unblockProcedure: provide a read-only board key in DIRECT_ATS_AUDIT_SOURCE, run the adapter beyond its cap, and archive exact external-ID reconciliation

expected: every partition has a distinct terminal state
actual: local rotating manifests are explicit, but JSearch exposes no proven disjoint exhaustive split or reliable total for capped queries
rootCause: live source totals and an exclusive source-supported partition dimension are unavailable
proposedFix: retain capped partitions as blocked until independently reconcilable source partitions are available

blocker.dependency: provider source-total metadata or independently enumerable disjoint partitions
blocker.unblockProcedure: provide a provider totals snapshot and reconcile exact unique external IDs across disjoint partitions

suspectedFailure: Filters discard jobs without stable reasons.
expected: stage counts reconcile by stable reason
actual: adapter normalization through validation, deduplication and canonical fake-DB writes covers unknown contracts, partners, incomplete locations, remote, Unicode and boundary dates

suspectedFailure: Partner, contract, geography and occupation branches are not fully observed.
expected: authoritative live provider x contract x geography x occupation matrix
actual: local planned matrix exists; authoritative live metadata unavailable

blocker.unblockProcedure: provide an exported provider metadata snapshot and compare it to the materialized coverage axes

suspectedFailure: Partial runs can drive stale invalidation and cutoff-free purge.
expected: absence mutation requires explicit complete snapshot
rootCause: maintenance had no completed-run proof input
proposedFix: explicit completeness gate and deletion fallback removal

suspectedFailure: Fuzzy deduplication can destroy distinct openings.
expected: provider+external ID stays canonical; fuzzy matches are review-only
actual: production occurrence, canonical URL, ATS ID and fingerprint classifiers pass with zero false merges and zero missed candidates

reproductionCommand: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_ingestion_scheduler_ledger.py backend/tests/test_ats_source_service.py && bun test tests/job-ingestion-audit.test.ts apps/worker/test/scheduler.test.ts
expected: run/partition counters, missed/stale/zero/drop alerts and idempotency are durable
actual: authoritative Python loops claim deterministic durable occurrences, reject duplicate-process claims, persist terminal summaries, and expose alert predicates
rootCause: in-process loops had no durable stage/partition accounting
proposedFix: narrow service-role claim/complete RPCs over the existing ledger; no writer transfer

suspectedFailure: Feed offset pagination and ingestion SQL degrade at representative cardinality.
expected: five-sample result digest and plan distribution
actual: read-only five-sample evaluator exists; representative database and product SLO unavailable

blocker.dependency: read-only representative Postgres connection and product SLO
blocker.unblockProcedure: provide INGESTION_AUDIT_SQL_DATABASE_URL, run five read-only EXPLAIN ANALYZE/BUFFERS samples, and compare ordered-ID digest

suspectedFailure: PostgREST offset pages are unstable on identical imported_at values and silently stop at 10k.
expected: unique tie-breaker ordering and an explicit error at the read ceiling
actual: job_id tie-breaker and cap-surfacing fixtures pass; phone-ready feed fixture passes
rootCause: imported_at-only ordering was non-unique and MAX_READ_ROWS termination was indistinguishable from exhaustion
proposedFix: append deterministic job_id ordering, raise on ceiling, and repair stale phone fixture only

suspectedFailure: Rotating slices mislabeled as full snapshots
affectedPath: France Travail and JSearch cycle manifests
expected: only an exact full authoritative manifest can authorize complete_snapshot
actual: slice runs remain partial_snapshot and subset proofs fail closed
baseline: rotating slice could previously populate proof scope from only current runs
rootCause: proof scope was derived from current rotating slice
proposedFix: register versioned/digested full-cycle manifests before claims

suspectedFailure: Partner, contract, geography and occupation branches are not fully observed.
expected: authoritative live provider x contract x geography x occupation matrix
actual: local planned matrix exists; anonymized paying-cohort aggregates unavailable

blocker.unblockProcedure: provide a least-privilege cohort-only database URL and run before/after relevant-job counts

expected: SELECT-only evaluator uses read-only transaction, five samples, buffers/plans and result-ID digest
actual: local evaluator contract tests pass; live measurements remain separately blocked
rootCause: performance blocker artifact had no executable evaluator
proposedFix: add project-native postgres evaluator without new dependency

affectedPath: Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Recruitee, Personio and Teamtailor adapters
expected: limit+1/cursor evidence produces complete or capped terminal status
actual: limit+1 and hard-cap fixtures mark source health capped_needs_split and do not advance last-success health

proposedFix: thread list-compatible batch completeness through source refresh; cap hits are terminal capped errors and never silent success
